name: LG_123_01_ORFICHE_INSERT
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[LG_123_01_ORFICHE_INSERT] ON [dbo].[LG_123_01_ORFICHE] 
AFTER INSERT AS
DECLARE @NUMBER Nvarchar(55)
SELECT @NUMBER=CL.CODE FROM inserted I
LEFT JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CL ON I.CLIENTREF=CL.LOGICALREF

IF(@NUMBER='DENEME_EFK')
BEGIN
SET IDENTITY_INSERT LG_223_01_ORFICHE ON
INSERT INTO [dbo].[LG_223_01_ORFICHE]
